rows.content: SCOPY      Edit/Brow  Copy selection to clipboard
SCREATE    Edit/Brow  Create original file from selection
SCUT       Edit/Brow  Copy selection to clipboard then delete it
SPASTE     Edit/Brow  Paste clipboard contents at cursor pos
SPLITV     General    Split screen vertically at midpoint
SREPLACE   Edit/Brow  Replace existing file with selection
STOLOWER   Edit/Brow  Convert selection alpha chars to lowercase
STOUPPER   Edit/Brow  Convert selection alpha chars to uppercase
SXCLUDE    Edit/Brow  Exclude all lines touched by selection
UNDO       Edit/Brow  Undo last file alteration
VSPLIT     General    Split screen vertically at cursor pos
